description: Provides comprehensive access to China Railway (12306) services, including station lookup, ticket availability queries, and train route information for planning rail travel across China.

tools.name: get_stations_code_in_city
tools.description: Retrieves all railway stations within a specified Chinese city, returning their station codes and names for use in ticket queries.

city.description: The Chinese name of the city to search for railway stations (e.g., '北京', '上海').

stations.description: List of all railway stations located in the specified city.

station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying this station.

station_name.description: The official Chinese name of the railway station.

tools.name: get_station_code_by_name
tools.description: Looks up the unique station code for a railway station by its Chinese name, enabling precise station identification for ticket searches.

station_name.description: The official Chinese name of the railway station to look up (e.g., '北京南站').

station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying this station.

tools.name: get_station_by_code
tools.description: Retrieves detailed information about a railway station using its station code, including contact details and location.

station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying this station.

station_name.description: The official Chinese name of the railway station.

address.description: The geographical location or physical address of the railway station.

phone.description: The contact telephone number for the railway station.

tools.name: get_tickets
tools.description: Queries the 12306 system for available train tickets between two stations on a specific date, returning train schedules and seat availability.

date.description: The travel date for the ticket query in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-mm-dd), e.g., '2024-03-15'.

from_station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying the departure station.

to_station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying the arrival station.

trains.description: List of available train services matching the query criteria, including schedule and seat availability.

train_no.description: The unique train number identifier for this service (e.g., 'G123', '240000G10336').

departure_time.description: The scheduled departure time from the origin station in HH:MM format.

arrival_time.description: The scheduled arrival time at the destination station in HH:MM format.

duration.description: The total travel time for this train journey (e.g., '5h 30m').

seat_availability.description: Current ticket availability for different seat classes on this train.

business_class.description: Number of available business class seats remaining for booking.

first_class.description: Number of available first class seats remaining for booking.

second_class.description: Number of available second class seats remaining for booking.

tools.name: get_train_route_stations
tools.description: Retrieves the complete route information for a specific train, including all intermediate stops with arrival and departure times.

date.description: The travel date for the train route query in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-mm-dd), e.g., '2024-03-15'.

from_station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying the departure station.

to_station_code.description: The unique station code used in the China Railway system for identifying the arrival station.

train_no.description: The unique train number identifier for this service (e.g., '240000G10336'), as returned by the get_tickets tool.

route_stations.description: Ordered list of all stations along the train's route, from origin to final destination.

station_name.description: The official Chinese name of the railway station on this route.

arrival_time.description: The scheduled arrival time at this station in HH:MM format (empty for the origin station).

departure_time.description: The scheduled departure time from this station in HH:MM format (empty for the final station).

stop_duration.description: The length of time the train stops at this station (e.g., '2 minutes', '5 minutes').
